subcodes.first_line: O friends and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! Praise be unto God that ye are of the household of that dignified personage, Áqá 'Alí-Núr, and his descendants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و اماء رحمن الحمد لله که خانه دان آنشخص وقور آقا علی نور هستید و بازماندگان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort
